mnemonics: Getters are like keys, they unlock the values.
Servlet parameter is like a box, you need the key to open it.
keyPoints: Servlets can read parameters from the URL using the GET and POST methods.
The HttpServletRequest object contains the parameters from the request.
The doGet() and doPost() methods return an int indicating the number of bytes available for the response body.
Use the getParameter() method to access individual parameters by name.
Use the getParameterNames() method to get the array of parameter names.
